OpenClass Agent Runtime Notes

1. Runtime boundaries
1.1 Host responsibilities
The host application owns authorization, validation, persistence, history, and audit records.

1.2 Agent responsibilities
The agent interprets the learning request, calls approved tools, and returns structured proposals.

2. Teaching workflow
2.1 Learner response
Answer the learner before proposing a document change.

2.2 Board update
Apply a board update only after the host confirms that the current turn is authorized to write.

3. Source workflow
3.1 Directory extraction
Inspect a source through bounded read-only tools and preserve its complete parent-child hierarchy.

3.2 Evidence validation
Publish verified evidence ranges and mark uncertain mappings as unmapped instead of guessing.
